lyrics:
Lyric SEVENTEEN - Jungle (S.COUPS Solo)

Romanization

Fact fact fact i badak sanjeungin nal check check
pae pae pae heotsori eumsogeo maemmaehae
Fact fact fact mitbadak tto witgonggi check hae
Game game game 10nyeonjjae pomoreun 3sedae

nae boneobeul jjocha
bul ppumeo gongjang
changjagi sosa
segye bangbanggokgok gipbal kkoja
I got to move sseogeo goyeosseo mul
jeungbalsikyeo tto jipyeosseo bul
teojineun syotpom jjalbajin songpom
jageukhae dopamin taewo hyeollyu

I don’t need a friend
jugobatgo ttak jilsaek
I don’t need respect
dareuji neowa nae insaeng
I need fans
isseum nun dora ttak jone
I need love
gangsani byeonhaedo an byeonhae

Fact fact fact 밑바닥 또 윗공기 check 해

불 뿜어 공장
창작이 솟아
세계 방방곡곡 깃발 꽂아

I need fans

I need love
